title: ♻️ Entropy-Binding Coils
name: Entropy-Binding Coils
what_it_is: Fractal coils or constructs that capture and stabilize chaos—binding entropy into usable energy or structure without collapse.
how_to_use: her body is wrapped in entropy coils—they pulse to keep her stable
the shrine hums—chaos neatly coiled beneath the altar
animation_behavior: Coils pulse to contain chaos bursts, fractal spins tighten when threat increases, visual oscillation syncs with entropy input ---
